description: Zeliq is a sales prospecting tool with 450M+ contacts, verified emails and phones, and automated multichannel sequences.
overview: Zeliq helps sales teams find verified contacts and automate outreach, drawing on more than 450 million contacts and AI-powered multichannel sequences to grow pipeline.
what_is: ZELIQ is a sales prospecting tool that streamlines lead generation and outreach. With more than 450 million contacts, it finds verified emails and phone numbers and automates multichannel sequences, with high enrichment rates and AI sequences to lift response rates.

It is strongest for sales development, account management, and marketing when finding, enriching, and engaging leads, with fast onboarding. ZELIQ integrates with CRMs like HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive, and works as a focused prospecting and enrichment layer rather than a full CRM replacement.
